ItacPersonItem.Notes: Portrait from Carlos Maria Carafa, Instruccion Christiana de principes, y Reyes, Palermo, 1688 (British Library Shelfmark: 4403.i.11.) Another portrait in Carlo Maria Carafa e Branciforte, Exemplar Horologjorum Solarjum Civilium, Mazareni, 1689 (British Library Shelfmark: C.129.g.5.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
